commentaries.author: Augustine of Hippo
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Teach me your way, O LORD, and lead me in a level path, because of my enemies. Augustine of Hippo 11. "Appoint me a law, O Lord, in Thy way" (ver. For me then who am setting out toward Thee, and commenting so great a profession, of arriving at wisdom, from fear, appoint, O Lord, a law in Thy way, lest in my wandering Thy rule abandon me. "And direct me in the right path because of mine enemies. " And direct me in the right way of its straits. For it is not enough to begin, since enemies cease not until the end is attained.

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Enemies, who strive to pervert me. Keep me in the right path, which thou hast already made known to me. (Worthington)

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
